parameters.query: SELECT role, content FROM sara_chat_memory WHERE session_id = '{{ $json.body.sessionId || "default" }}' ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 10;

{{ `INSERT INTO sara_chat_memory (session_id, role, content, user_name, user_email) VALUES ('${$json.sessionId}', 'user', '${$('Process Input').item.json.query?.replace(/'/g, "''") || "[Imagen]"}', '${$('Process Input').item.json.userName}', '${$('Process Input').item.json.userEmail}'), ('${$json.sessionId}', 'assistant', '${$json.response.replace(/'/g, "''")}', '${$('Process Input').item.json.userName}', '${$('Process Input').item.json.userEmail}');` }}
